Patch Set 10:

Is there a ticket that describes what problems exist with DoM+FLR layouts?  One option would be to have a second FLR layout that has a component at the start of the file that matches the 1MB (or whatever) DoM component. Better would be to just have a regular PFL single-stripe component that matches the first component of the replica.

commit.subject: LU-9771 flr: to not support dom+flr for phase 1
commit.message:
LU-9771 flr: to not support dom+flr for phase 1

To exclude the support of dom+flr.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-flr
